title: Saint Petersburg、Saint Petersburg — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Saint Petersburg、Saint Petersburg的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Saint Petersburg是Saint Petersburg的一個城市，人口約5,400,000。Russia’s cultural capital, a stunning city of canals and imperial palaces, home to the Hermitage Museum and White Nights festival.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
